# ensure-simulator

Ensure iOS simulator exists

## Usage

```bash
agent-device ensure-simulator [--runtime <id>] [--boot] [--reuse-existing]
```

## Session Requirement

Does not require an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--runtime <id>`: ensure-simulator: CoreSimulator runtime identifier (e.g. com.apple.CoreSimulator.SimRuntime.iOS-18-0)
- `--boot`: ensure-simulator: boot the simulator after ensuring it exists
- `--reuse-existing`: ensure-simulator: reuse an existing simulator (default: true)

## Platform Coverage

_Capability checks are not defined for this command in `command-schema.ts`._
